component.name: WhatCable
component.summary: Inspect USB-C cable and power capabilities

description.p: WhatCable reads Linux Type-C and USB Power Delivery sysfs data and shows what each USB-C port, cable, partner, and charger reports.
It also reports connected USB devices, Thunderbolt and USB4 data exposed by the kernel, and the raw sysfs values behind each summary.

screenshot.caption: Inspect connected USB devices and exposed power capabilities

description.p: Initial release with a GTK interface, JSON output, and read-only Flatpak packaging.
